entities.name: Coffee Space
entities.context: A platform that collaborates with recruitment partners and interlaces their candidates into recommendations, splitting fees when candidates are hired

entities.name: recruitment style partner
entities.context: Partner organization whose candidates are integrated into Coffee Space's recommendations and shares fees when their candidates are hired

entities.name: interview system
entities.context: A system being built by the team to control candidate evaluation experience and own more of the assessment surface area

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: Company that shifted from a career coaching app for job seekers to an employer-funded model for candidate assessment

entities.name: job seekers
entities.context: Target audience that Careerspan originally served directly with career coaching services

entities.name: career coaching app
entities.context: Careerspan's previous product offering for direct-to-job-seeker career coaching services

entities.name: employer funded model
entities.context: Business model shift where employers fund the candidate assessment process rather than job seekers paying directly

entities.name: structured self reflection conversations
entities.context: Method used by Careerspan where candidates go through guided reflection to produce evidence of their work

entities.name: high resolution evidence
entities.context: Detailed, concrete evidence of a candidate's work produced through structured self-reflection conversations

entities.name: mental model
entities.context: Growing representation of each candidate built through repeated stories and experience mapping

entities.name: repeated stories
entities.context: Multiple narrative accounts used to construct the growing mental model of each candidate

entities.name: concrete experiences
entities.context: Real work experiences that serve as the foundation for mapping skills and responsibilities in the mental model

entities.name: responsibilities
entities.context: Work responsibilities mapped onto concrete experiences as part of the candidate mental model

entities.name: hard skills
entities.context: Technical competencies mapped onto concrete experiences as part of the candidate mental model

entities.name: soft skills
entities.context: Interpersonal and behavioral competencies mapped onto concrete experiences as part of the candidate mental model

relationships.context: Coffee Space collaborates with recruitment partners, integrating their candidates into recommendations
Careerspan employs structured conversations as its core assessment methodology
Conversations generate detailed evidence of candidate work and capabilities
The model grows through multiple narrative accounts collected over time
Responsibilities are grounded in specific work experiences
Technical skills are grounded in specific work experiences
Behavioral skills are grounded in specific work experiences
Business model evolution from direct-to-consumer to employer-funded
